content.en:
"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian came to the mansion of the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, and saw the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, and said.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, please take a seat!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor would not communicate with Ye Tian in a higher-level tone, he knew very well that it would be very easy for Ye Tian to surpass himself in the future, maybe he would still need to rely on Ye Tian in the future, so he naturally had to have a good relationship with Ye Tian.

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, I don't know if there is any information about the Ghost Fox Organization, such as where are those Supreme Domain Ancestors?"

Ye Tian asked.

After all, it was the first time he had come to the Dark Sanctuary, and he didn't know much about it, so naturally it was impossible for him to look for the Ghost Fox Organization, and no matter how much time he gave him, he wouldn't be able to find the Ghost Fox Organization!

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor said: "I don't know where the headquarters of the Ghost Fox Organization is, but the Battle Gate has found out the location of several branches, this is about those branches, as well as some information about the Ghost Fox Organization's strongest domain ancestor and the current position, these information are all for you!"

Ye Tian took the information and said gratefully: "Thank you Blood Gang Domain Ancestor!"

At this time, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor said again: "The superior domain ancestors of the Battle Gate have issued a big order, asking me to follow you, if the Ghost Fox Organization secretly violates the rules, I will take action to protect you." But if the Invincible Domain Ancestor of the Ghost Fox Organization doesn't make a move, it will be impossible for me to make a move!"

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Ye Tian chatted with the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor for a while, then left here, returned to his residence, and began to study the intelligence of the Ghost Fox Organization.

This information is not very content, but the introduction of the Ghost Fox Organization is more detailed.

In addition, it also tells the information of the four-star kings of the multiple ghost fox organizations.

The deceased Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor and the Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor are not counted, and there are eight four-star kings in the Ghost Fox Organization on the bright side.

Among them, it is more noteworthy to two of the four-star kings - Yuanfeng Domain Ancestor and Xuangui Domain Ancestor.

The strength of these two four-star kings is much stronger than that of ordinary four-star kings, and they can almost rank in the top 30 of the battle gate supreme list.

Their soul holy light is very rich, and they have all cultivated a holy technique to the Xiaocheng realm, and they have also cultivated the holy body to the extreme realm, and they have mastered more domain techniques and secret techniques.

And both the domain body and the domain power have been cultivated to the current extreme, extremely pure, if it weren't for the desire to condense the holy soul, these two four-star kings would have already broken through to the invincible domain ancestor realm.

Moreover, they were still very old Supreme Domain Ancestors, even older than many Invincible Domain Ancestors.

In addition to these two Supreme Domain Ancestors, the other Supreme Domain Ancestors are more ordinary, that is, the level of the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor, and some are even inferior to the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor.

Although Ye Tian said that he wanted to challenge the strongest domain ancestor of the ghost fox organization, it did not mean that he would have to challenge immediately.

He was going to use some of the treasures of the Battle Gate to cultivate for a period of time, and then challenge those Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Ghost Fox Organization.

After all, he hadn't cultivated in the Battle Gate before, and many treasures and benefits had not been used, once he used it, he could also enhance some of his strength, and he would be even more sure when the time came.

The only pity is that his current body is a copy of his body, although he can cultivate, but it is not necessary to improve his cultivation, it is a complete waste.

But the holy technique can be improved, once another holy skill is cultivated to the extreme realm, then Ye Tian's strength will increase even more.

The Ancestral Relic is helpful for the cultivation of the Holy Technique, but there are not many Ancestral Relic in the Battle Gate, and such consumable opportunities are rarely given.

However, there is a treasure in the battle gate that countless people envy, but the domain ancestors are only allowed to enter once.

This treasure land is the time realm of the War Ancestor Realm!

The realm of time is similar to the gate of the stone pupil in the original Heavenly Emperor Palace, but the gate of the stone pupil is too low-level, but the realm of time is extremely magical, where time is almost frozen, no matter how long you cultivate in it, it will still be the original time.

However, if you cultivate in the realm of time, you can't cultivate for too many years, otherwise it will be easy to be assimilated by time and eternally integrated into the realm of time.

Moreover, once it is assimilated, no one can save it, after all, the outside world has not come out for a moment in the past, which means that it has been assimilated.

Because of this, the Battle Gate did not allow the Domain Ancestors to enter the second time, otherwise the second time would almost be assimilated.

Only one entry is allowed, so many Domain Ancestors will only enter the Time Realm after stepping into the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

Ye Tian, as the former First Holy Son, naturally had the authority to enter the realm of time.

He is ready to take advantage of this opportunity to enter the realm of time, and maybe he will be able to transform his strength.

------------------

this day.

In front of the Hall of Time, Ye Qingtian came here.

At this time, there are two invincible domain ancestors here.

"I've seen two domain ancestors, I am the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, this is my token, I want to enter the realm of time to cultivate!"

Ye Tian took out his token and said.

"We know you, you are going to enter the realm of time to cultivate, have you thought about it? The Invincible Domain Ancestor realm is the most cost-effective to enter the well of time, after all, you can only enter once in a lifetime. There is no way to improve your cultivation in the Well of Time, and there is no way to improve your soul holy light, even if you raise your cultivation to a higher level in the realm of time, after coming out, you will still return to the original state, and all that can be brought out is understanding, don't waste a chance!"

One of the Invincible Domain Ancestors persuaded.

"I've thought about it!"

Ye Tian said seriously.

"Okay then, let's review it and notify the above!"

The two Invincible Domain Ancestors reported Ye Tian's situation, and the formalities were completed soon after, which allowed Ye Tian to enter the realm of time.

The entrance to the Time Realm is a huge space-time portal, but unlike the space-time gate of the Dark Destruction Domain, the space-time gate of the War Gate is a gateway to the time-realm, and has no other use.

The ancient door of time and space opened, and Ye Tian stepped into it.

Wow!

Countless time forces enveloped Ye Tian, and in an instant, Ye Tian came to a completely new world.

This is a valley, and everything around it seems to be the same as an ordinary valley, but in Ye Tian's eyes, it is all composed of the power of time.

This is the world of time, that is, the realm of time!

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to comprehend the holy technique, and found that there were also other forbidden ways here, but they were suppressed by the power of time, so they could not be revealed, but it did not affect Ye Tian's comprehension of other paths.

However, the most suitable for enlightenment is the time holy technique!

And Ye Tian happened to know the Time Saint Technique, I have to say that this place is indeed extremely suitable for Ye Tian.

"It's right! Not to mention anything else, the Time Saint Technique, I will definitely be able to cultivate it to the limit!"

Ye Tian said confidently.
